en: Just feels like the whole thing is, they're all donkeys. Come on in! Come on in!
ko: 전체적으로 걔들이 다 멍청이 같은 느낌이야. 어서 와!

en: Hey, what's up, boys? Hey!
Pete in the house! Pete Bear!
The king of Staten Island himself! What? Nothing. What's up?
ko: 스태튼 아일랜드의 왕이야! 뭐? 아무것도. 뭐야?

en: Well, I just want to say, first off, you guys have been making some really fun videos for the show this year. Dude, thank you, man. That's very nice.
ko: 일단, 올해 쇼에서 정말 재밌는 영상들 많이 만들었더라고. 고마워, 정말 좋은 말이다.

en: It got me thinking, I was like, we should all do a video together.
I had this idea where maybe we could do a music video about how we're all best friends and how we're boys.
"Think we would be in it with you?" "Yeah.
You guys would be the boys, so..." "Yeah. Yeah, I'd say so." "Yeah!" "Let's do it!"
ko: 너희가 그 형제들 역할이니까. 그래, 하자!

en: Yo!
It's Pete, P-D-D!
Let's go!
Another day in the life of Pete.
Just sitting in the courtside seat.
People want to take my picture with selfie sticks.
ko: 사람들이 셀카봉으로 내 사진 찍고 싶어 해.

en: It winds up on Page Six. It's never-ending.
Every day I'm trending, I'm trending.
People want to see the text that I'm sending.
ko: 사람들이 내가 보내는 문자를 보고 싶어 해.

en: All my friends are cool and famous, except these three sad virgins.
ko: 내 친구들은 다 멋지고 유명해, 이 세 명의 불쌍한 동정 빼고.

en: "Three sad virgins?" "What?"
"Three sad virgins!" "Whoa!"
"Three sad virgins." "What?"
"Three sad virgins!" "Whoa!" Sorry.
Can we time out for a second? "Yeah."
ko: 잠깐 타임아웃 좀 할 수 있어? "응."

en: "What's going on, guys?" "You having fun?"
"I'm having a blast."
Quick question: is this about us? "Which part?"
"I guess the 'three sad virgins' part." "Yeah."
"Because, like, we have had sex."
"Maybe not super recently, but..."
"Guys, it's just a parody video.
You guys are just playing characters."
"People won't think it's us."
"It's not about you at all."
The names are Martin, Ben, and John.
And they work at the show I'm on.
They just don't have any swag. "What?"
They're tall and weird and sad.
John's loud, but not very smart.
Ben's breath kind of smells like a fart.
And Martin's penis tip is way too red.
ko: 그리고 Martin의 그것 끝이 너무 빨개.

en: At least, that's what his doctor said. "Three sad virgins!" "What?" "Three sad virgins!" "Whoa!"
ko: 의사가 그렇게 말했대. "세 명의 불쌍한 동정!" "뭐?" "세 명의 불쌍한 동정!" "와!"

en: "Oh my God."
"That was my real doctor."
"I've got to say something to him."
"Yeah, you should." "Pete."
"Yeah, you should, Pete."
"What's up?" "We love it! Love it."
"I just had one, like, tiny thought."
"This guy's notes..." "Leave it as is. It's rocking, dude."
"Hey, do you have an ashtray, by any chance?" "Oh yeah, thanks. There you go."
My only thing is, maybe it could just be, like, completely different.
ko: 내 의견은, 완전히 다르게 하면 어떨까.

en: "Oh." "Oh, OK."
Maybe it's something topical, like, Dune's a big movie.
Something with Dune? A Dune rap!
All right. All right, guys.
It's now a Dune rap.
So let's get some fucking sand in here! "Yeah!" All right.
The planet Dune is very nice.
It's a world that's made of spice.
It's sandy like a playa, with Zendaya.
I'm going to ride a worm, and these guys suck.
"Three sad virgins!" "What?"
"Three sad virgins on Dune!"
"Why is he humiliating us?"
"Ben, why are you dressed as Wendy from Wendy's?"
"Pete made me do it."
"And why are we up here?"
ko: 근데 왜 우리가 여기 위에 있어?

en: "He said we're like the flying sand sack." "You know what?
We can't stand for this, right?"
"I know. Let's go."
"Ben! Ben! Let us go! Let us go!" "Ben! Ben!" "You OK, Pete?"
ko: Ben! Ben! 우리 내려줘! Ben! 괜찮아, Pete?

en: "Are you guys ready to go in again?" "No."
"But we can't do this anymore, OK? It's humiliating." "Damn, guys. I'm sorry.
ko: 근데 더 이상 못 해, 알겠지? 굴욕적이야. 이런, 얘들아. 미안.

en: I thought this would be a fun thing for all of us."
"If it's not, then let's just end it." "Thanks, Pete." "Thank you, Pete."
ko: 아니면 그냥 그만하자. 고마워, Pete. 브릿지 끝나고.

en: "I mean, after we do the bridge." "Wait, what bridge?"
"Hey, Pete!"
"Oh hey, Taylor."
"No no no no no no no no!"
ko: 안 돼, 안 돼, 안 돼!

en: "That's not true."
"Yeah, that's accurate." "True."
